dashboard.title: Patient Health Overview
dashboard.delete_layout_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this layout?

patients.manage_profiles: Manage patient profiles and clinical health records.
patients.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete patient {{name}}? All associated medical records, examinations, and biomarkers will be lost. This cannot be undone.
patients.no_results: No results for "{{term}}". Try a different search.
patients.start_adding: Start by adding your first patient to the clinic directory.
patients.delete_profile_confirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete patient {{name}}? All clinical data, examinations, and biomarkers will be lost forever.
patients.no_exams_recorded: No examinations recorded for this patient.

offline_banner.title: Viewing Offline Copy
offline_banner.subtitle: This data is stored locally. Some attachments may be unavailable until you go online.

header.full_reconstruction_desc: Run OCR and extract all fields
header.fast_extraction_desc: Extract fields from existing text only
header.manage_staff: Manage clinical staff for this visit
header.delete_message: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this examination record?
header.failed_add_doctor: Failed to add doctor to the system.

summarize.label: Visit Summary
summarize.prompt: Please summarize this examination for me.

findings.label: Clinical Findings
findings.prompt: Extract the main clinical findings and medical information from this examination.

analysis.label: Deep Analysis
analysis.prompt: What is the clinical significance and key implications of the findings in this examination?

overview.patient_notes_placeholder: Describe your symptoms or health updates...
overview.patient_notes_empty: Use this space to record how you felt, questions for the doctor, or lifestyle changes discussed.

biomarkers.no_data_subtitle: Structured biomarkers will appear here automatically after AI analysis is complete.

imaging.no_visual_diagnostics_subtitle: Images, scans, and radiology reports will populate this gallery.

create_biomarker.title: New Biomarker Definition
create_biomarker.failed_create: Failed to create biomarker definition. Slug might already exist.

allergies.title: Clinical Alerts: Allergies
allergies.no_allergies: No known allergies or intolerances recorded.
allergies.remove_confirm: Are you sure you want to remove the record for {{name}}? This should only be done if the record was entered in error.

modal.high_criticality_warning: High criticality allergy. Exercise extreme caution.
modal.notes_placeholder: Additional clinical context or specific instructions...

examinations.title: Examinations
examinations.subtitle: Unified multi-document clinical timeline
examinations.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete {{count}} examination records? All associated documents and extracted biomarkers will also be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.

category_manager.title: Category Manager
category_manager.subtitle: Manage clinical specialties and visit types
category_manager.no_selection_desc: Select a category to edit its appearance or create a new one to expand your specialty list.
category_manager.delete_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to delete this category? Examinations using this category will be unlinked.
category_manager.global_restriction: Global Categories cannot be edited or deleted

biomarkers.title: Biomarkers
biomarkers.subtitle: Biomarker trends and longitudinal health patterns
biomarkers.no_results_subtitle: Try adjusting your search terms or filters. If you haven't uploaded any medical documents yet, biomarkers will appear here after processing.
biomarkers.delete_message: Are you sure you want to delete this specific biomarker result? This action cannot be undone.

biomarker_catalog.title: Biomarker Catalog
biomarker_catalog.subtitle: Manage definitions, aliases, and standardized mapping
biomarker_catalog.no_biomarkers: No biomarkers found matching your search.
biomarker_catalog.range_warning: Important: Ensure ranges match the clinical standard for the selected Preferred Unit.
biomarker_catalog.info_placeholder: Describe what this biomarker represents, normal ranges, and clinical significance...
biomarker_catalog.info_note: Note: This information will be displayed in popups across the platform for this biomarker.

documents_explorer.title: Documents Explorer
documents_explorer.subtitle: Unified diagnostic imaging and document repository
documents_explorer.no_preview: Preview not available for this file type.
documents_explorer.raw_ocr_subtitle: OCR results and text extraction from document

medications.catalog_subtitle: Browse and manage available medications, indications, and side effects.
medications.no_results_for: No results for "{{term}}". Try a different search.
medications.catalog_empty: The medication catalog is currently empty.
medications.name: Medication Name
medications.failed_add: Failed to add medication. Please try again.
medications.no_description: No description available for this medication.
medications.dosage_guidelines_not_available: Standard dosage guidelines are not available.
medications.no_patients_prescribed: No patients are currently prescribed this medication.

explain.label: Explain Medication
explain.description: What is this drug and how does it work?
explain.prompt: Please explain what {{name}} is, its primary mechanism of action, and what it is typically prescribed for in simple terms.

interactions.label: Check Interactions
interactions.prompt: Analyze potential drug-drug interactions for {{name}}. Are there any common medications, supplements, or foods that should be avoided while taking this?

side_effects.label: Side Effects Guide
side_effects.prompt: Provide a comprehensive overview of the common and rare side effects of {{name}}. Include information on which symptoms require immediate medical attention.

dosage.label: Standard Dosage
dosage.prompt: What are the standard dosage guidelines for {{name}} for various conditions? Note: Remind the user to follow their specific prescription.

medications.no_linked_exams: No linked clinical examinations found for this prescription.
medications.add_to_your_records_desc: You don't have this medication in your active clinical records. Add it from a patient profile to enable scheduling.
medications.management_actions_desc: Global management of this drug resource in the clinic catalog.
medications.try_adjusting_filters: Try adjusting your search terms or filters to find what you're looking for.
medications.remove_record_confirm: Are you sure you want to remove the record for {{name}}?

modal.indications_q: What is this drug used for?
modal.notes_placeholder: Record any specific observations or patient reported effects...

calendar.no_doses: No doses scheduled for this day.

ai_disclaimer.medical_warning: This content is AI-generated and does not constitute professional medical advice. AI can hallucinate or omit critical information. Always verify with a certified healthcare provider.
ai_disclaimer.privacy_local: This AI model runs locally. Your data does not leave your infrastructure.
ai_disclaimer.privacy_cloud: Data relevant to this context may be transmitted to and processed by 3rd-party LLM Cloud providers based on your system's AI configuration.

ai_chat.welcome_message: Hello! I'm your medical data assistant. How can I help you today?

status.error: I'm sorry, I encountered an error while responding.

insights.title: Health Analysis
insights.select_patient: Please select a patient to enable clinical insights.
insights.select_document: Select a document or examination to generate clinical insights for {{name}}.

health_summary.label: Patient Health Summary
health_summary.description: Generate a comprehensive overview of the current health status
health_summary.prompt: Generate a professional clinical summary for this patient. Include a high-level overview of their health status, active medications, most recent critical biomarker findings, and any notable trends from their history.

soap_note.label: Draft SOAP Note
soap_note.description: Structure this session into standard medical documentation
soap_note.prompt: Based on our conversation and the available clinical data, draft a structured SOAP note (Subjective, Objective, Assessment, Plan). Ensure the assessment section synthesizes current biomarker data if available.

trend_analysis.label: Longitudinal Trend Analysis
trend_analysis.description: Deep dive into biomarker changes over the last 6 months
trend_analysis.prompt: Analyze the longitudinal trends for all available biomarkers over the last 6 months. Identify any concerning patterns, improvements, or results that require immediate clinical follow-up.

safety_audit.label: Medication Safety Audit
safety_audit.description: Review current medications for interactions and risks
safety_audit.prompt: Perform a thorough clinical audit of the patient's current medication list. Look for potential drug-drug interactions, contraindications based on their health profile, and suggest any necessary monitoring (like lab tests) for these specific drugs.

patient_education.label: Explain to Patient
patient_education.description: Translate complex findings into patient-friendly language
patient_education.prompt: Summarize the latest examination findings and biomarker results in clear, patient-friendly language. Avoid excessive medical jargon, explain why specific tests were performed, and suggest 3 simple questions the patient should ask their doctor during the next visit.

input.placeholder: Describe clinical symptoms or ask for data analysis...
input.disclaimer: AI is not a medical advisor and can make mistakes. Always consult your doctor.

alerts_page.title: Clinical Alerts: Tenant Overview
alerts_page.subtitle: Monitoring active clinical risks and allergies across all patients
alerts_page.no_alerts_subtitle: There are currently no active clinical allergy alerts matching your filters.

doctors.management_subtitle: Manage clinical staff and care team profiles
doctors.delete_doctor_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete the profile for {{name}}?
doctors.start_adding_subtitle: Start by adding your first clinician to the directory.

events.title: Clinical Events
events.schedule_recurrence_desc: Set up a repeating schedule for this clinical event.

pain-episode.title: e.g. Chronic Lower Back Pain
pain-episode.description: e.g. Sharp pain started after lifting, radiates to left leg.

pregnancy.title: e.g. Third Pregnancy (2026)
pregnancy.description: e.g. Tracking routine milestones and prenatal health.

accident.title: e.g. Car Accident Recovery
accident.description: e.g. Sustained whiplash and bruising, monitoring recovery.

flare-up.title: e.g. Arthritis Flare-up
flare-up.description: e.g. Significant inflammation in hands and knees.

surgical-recovery.title: e.g. Post-Op: Knee Replacement
surgical-recovery.description: e.g. Monitoring incision healing and range of motion.

dental.title: e.g. Braces Treatment, Implant Surgery
dental.description: e.g. Alignment tracking and monthly adjustments.

vision.title: e.g. Cataract Laser Surgery, LASIK
vision.description: e.g. Monitoring vision clarity and post-op healing.

aesthetic.title: e.g. Face Cleaning, Chemical Peel
aesthetic.description: e.g. Regular skin maintenance and rejuvenation.

maintenance.title: e.g. Annual Dental Cleaning, Routine Screening
maintenance.description: e.g. Preventive checkups and overall status monitoring.

events.reason_for_visit_placeholder: Reason for including this visit (e.g. initial diagnosis, follow-up scan)
events.occurrence_notes_placeholder: Describe what happened, triggers, or relief...
events.no_occurrences_hint: No specific episodes recorded yet. Use tracking for chronic flare-ups or recurring pains.
events.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete "{{title}}"? This will unlink all associated clinical data.
events.no_events_description: Events help you track long-term health journeys like pregnancies, chronic pain cycles, or recovery from accidents.
events.no_linked_visits: No linked clinical examinations found for this event.
events.link_to_this_visit: Link this clinical visit to existing or new journeys
events.no_events_found: No health journeys found for this patient.

organizations.subtitle: Manage hospitals, clinics, and medical organizations

organizations.start_adding_subtitle: Start by adding your first hospital or clinic to the directory.
organizations.name: Facility Name
organizations.no_doctors_linked: No doctors linked to this facility yet.

admin.user_management_subtitle: Manage family members, staff, and access levels
admin.link_identity_help: Associate {{email}} with a clinical patient or doctor record.
admin.cannot_delete_self: You cannot delete your own account.
admin.delete_user_confirm: Are you sure you want to remove {{email}}? They will lose access to this installation.
admin.unlink_confirm_patient: Are you sure you want to unlink this patient profile from this user?
admin.unlink_confirm_doctor: Are you sure you want to unlink this professional profile from this user?

backup.title: Export & Import
backup.subtitle: Back up data as FHIR Bundles or full archives; restore from a backup file

settings.appearance_subtitle: Personal preferences. Override the defaults set by your organization.
settings.tenant_subtitle: Defaults for everyone in this tenant. Users can override these.
settings.system_subtitle: Global defaults for all tenants. Tenant and user settings override these.
settings.inheritance_hint: Higher levels (System -> Tenant -> User) set defaults. Explicit values here override what is inherited.

category.appearance_desc: How biomarkers and dashboards are displayed.
category.notifications_desc: How and when you get notified.

settings.biomarker_precision_desc: Decimal places for biomarker values of 30 and above (e.g. steps, glucose in mg/dL).
settings.show_reference_ranges_desc: Display the normal reference range alongside biomarker values and charts.
settings.show_relative_scores_desc: Show the lab-agnostic 0-1 relative position within the reference range.
settings.compact_dashboard_desc: Reduce padding on dashboard cards to fit more information.
settings.date_format_desc: Preferred date format used across the app.
settings.theme_desc: Interface color scheme. Stored per device, so you can keep different themes on different devices.
settings.notifications_enabled_desc: Master toggle for push and in-app notifications on this device.
settings.settings.biomarker_precision_desc: Decimal places for biomarker values of 10 and above (e.g. heart rate, cholesterol).
settings.settings.precision_below_10_desc: Decimal places for values from 3 up to 10 (e.g. glucose, hemoglobin).
settings.settings.precision_below_3_desc: Decimal places for values from 1 up to 3 (e.g. TSH, bilirubin).
settings.settings.precision_below_1_desc: Decimal places for very small values under 1 (e.g. troponin, fractions).
settings.precision_below_30_desc: Decimal places for values from 10 up to 30 (e.g. heart rate, blood pressure).
